updates.title: Claude Code v2.1.160, v2.1.161, and v2.1.162 Released — Three Updates in Under 24 Hours
updates.summary: Anthropic shipped three Claude Code releases within a 24-hour window on June 2–3, 2026. Key new capabilities include a `waitingFor` field in `claude agents --json` for agent blocking visibility, OTEL resource attribute labels on metric datapoints for enterprise observability, improved parallel tool call handling (failed Bash commands no longer cancel other in-flight calls), and `/effort` command persistence confirmation. The releases also rename the Windsurf IDE integration to Devin Desktop, add Remote Control as a persistent footer pill instead of a startup message, and fix 20+ bugs across Windows/WSL, background sessions, MCP server timeouts, VS Code integration, and more.
updates.accuracy_notes: Version numbers and changelog details verified directly from Anthropic's official GitHub repository (github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases). Exact timestamps confirmed: v2.1.160 at 2026-06-02T02:10, v2.1.161 at 2026-06-02T21:58, v2.1.162 at 2026-06-03T21:31. High confidence — primary source data.
